utility_evaluation.REASONING:

Required format items (7 total):
1. destination: chosen destination for the trip
2. travel_dates: specific dates for the trip
3. transportation: flight details with costs
4. accommodation: hotel selection with costs
5. activities: selected activities with costs
6. additional_services: any extra services with costs
7. total_budget: complete cost breakdown

4. ACCOMMODATION: ✓ Fully specified - Hotel selection includes name (Tranquil Inn), rating (3-star), cost per night (€100), number of nights (4), and total cost (€400)

5. ACTIVITIES: ✓ Fully specified - Four activities are listed with individual costs: City Walking Tour (€70), Science Museum for Kids (€60), Zoo Visit (€80), Evening Cultural Festival (€90). Activities are family-appropriate for children aged 12 and 9.

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: ✓ Fully specified - Includes restaurant reservations (3 restaurants with costs: €50, €25, €25) and airport taxi (€80)

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided with all categories (flights €360, accommodation €400, activities €300, restaurants €100, airport taxi €80), total estimated cost (€1,240), and remaining budget (€460 from the €1,700 budget)

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details.
